commit.message:
fix: offline sync reliability + block VT finish when offline

- Recover orphaned "syncing" mutations back to "pending" on sync start
- Merge vt-field mutations by dossierId+sectionKey (50 calls → ~8)
- Add sync lock to prevent concurrent syncs
- Block "Terminer" on firma_finale when offline with pending mutations

commit.message:
Process all unscored articles per cycle, not just the first 100

Both processArticlesForUser (CLI) and Engine.ProcessNewArticles now loop
until GetUnscoredArticlesForUser returns empty, draining the backlog in
a single scheduler cycle rather than leaving the remainder for the next
30-minute window. Group summary updates still run once after all batches
complete.

commit.message:
Align completion tracker + aging accounts status calculations

1. Aging accounts: add is_tracked filter (was including removed accounts)
2. Tracker: use real bill date + service period for expected_by
   (was using theoretical cycle_start + days_between, causing Late
   bucket to always be 0 and counts to diverge from aging accounts)
3. Tracker now stores bill_date and service_days per indexed bill
   and looks backwards to find the most recent bill before each
   missing cycle to calculate when the next bill was actually expected

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* adding client ids

* Fix CORS preflight for new API endpoints

Add explicit OPTIONS methods with mock integrations for:
- /v1/auth/github
- /v1/delete/{proxy+}
- /v1/my-configs

API Gateway requires explicit OPTIONS routing for aws_proxy integrations
to handle browser preflight requests properly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Revert "Fix CORS preflight for new API endpoints"

This reverts commit e3bdde72bed126e8cfeb9e1ef43041499e45cd73.

* Fix CORS allowOrigins - remove embedded single quotes

The x-amazon-apigateway-cors allowOrigins should be plain URLs, not
quoted strings. The browser sends 'Origin: https://staging.gogen.io'
but the config was expecting "'https://staging.gogen.io'" (with quotes).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add explicit OPTIONS methods for CORS preflight handling

API Gateway REST APIs with DefinitionBody don't honor the
x-amazon-apigateway-cors extension. Need explicit OPTIONS methods
with mock integrations to handle CORS preflight requests.

Added OPTIONS handlers for:
- /v1/upsert
- /v1/auth/github
- /v1/delete/{proxy+}
- /v1/my-configs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Redesign UI with dark developer-focused theme (#78)

Transform the UI from a light web app to a dark terminal-style aesthetic:
- Add terminal color palette (term-bg, term-green, term-cyan, term-red, etc.)
- Add JetBrains Mono font for code and config names
- Update all components with dark backgrounds and muted borders
- Configure Monaco editor and xterm terminal with vs-dark theme
- Reduce padding throughout for more compact, developer-friendly layout

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Unify create/edit screens with execution panel and collapsible JSON browser (#79)

Add ExecutionComponent to EditConfigurationPage so users can test configs
while creating or editing. Replace output mode dropdown with terminal/structured
tabs that are both populated from a single execution. Add interactive JsonBrowser
component with per-event collapse/expand and expand-all toggle. Fix staging dev
proxy to avoid CORS issues.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Improve test coverage from 52% to 75% with simplified test helpers (#81)

Add comprehensive tests across generator, internal, outputter, rater,
run, and timer packages. Extract shared test helpers (setupGenTest,
resetRunState) to reduce boilerplate. Consolidate token validation
tests into table-driven subtests. Remove duplicate test and fix
no-op assertions. Add CLAUDE.md with project conventions.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* DRY quick wins: reduce boilerplate with no behavior change

- Replace 100+ lines of hardcoded rate maps with uniformRateMap() helper
- Replace 15 if-zero-then-default blocks with generic setDefault[T]() helper
- Fix !x.initialized style in 4 outputters (idiomatic Go)
- Use strings.HasPrefix for URL check safety (prevents panic on short strings)
- Remove unused sync.Once variable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Replace deprecated io/ioutil with io and os equivalents

- ioutil.ReadAll -> io.ReadAll
- ioutil.ReadFile -> os.ReadFile
- ioutil.WriteFile -> os.WriteFile
- ioutil.Discard -> io.Discard
- Remove io/ioutil imports from all affected files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Deduplicate Splunk HEC field transform into template.TransformHECFields

Extract shared _raw->event, _time->time renaming logic into
template/hec.go and call it from both outputter and template packages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add HTTP helper with proper resource cleanup and error type

- Add HTTPError type in internal/errors.go for structured HTTP errors
- Add doHTTPRequest/doGet/doPost helpers that properly defer Body.Close()
- Add defaultAPIClient with 30s timeout (was unbounded)
- Refactor listsearch/Get/upsert to use helpers, fixing body leaks
- List() and Search() now return errors instead of calling log.Fatal
- Upsert() now returns error instead of calling log.Fatal
- Fix parseWebConfig body leak with defer resp.Body.Close()
- Fix outputter/http.go body leak by using defer on resp.Body.Close()
- Use %w for error wrapping throughout gogen.go

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Improve error handling: return parse errors, log marshal errors

- parseFileConfig now returns parse errors instead of silently logging
- Log json.Marshal errors in template funcs instead of ignoring
- Log template creation errors in config instead of discarding
- Use %w for error wrapping in parseFileConfig
- Update tests to expect returned parse errors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix logger package name to match directory (logging -> logger)

Go convention requires package name to match directory name.
All importers already use an alias (log "github.com/coccyx/gogen/logger")
so no other changes are needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Split config.go into focused files for better maintainability

Extract validation, parsing, and system token logic from the 900+ line
config.go into config_validate.go, config_parse.go, and
config_system_tokens.go. All files remain in package internal with no
import changes needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix concurrency safety: sync.Once for ROT init, replace deprecated oauth2.NoContext

Use sync.Once to ensure the ROT channel and readStats goroutine are
initialized exactly once, eliminating the race between ROT() starting
in a goroutine and Account() reading the channel. ReadFinal resets
the Once so tests can re-initialize cleanly.

Replace deprecated oauth2.NoContext with context.Background() in
GitHub OAuth flows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix flaky TestTCPRFC5424Output by trimming trailing newline

The regex used a $ anchor but network output includes a trailing
newline, causing intermittent match failures depending on test
execution order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add integration test suite and optimize string building in token generation

Add tests/integration_test.go with 28 tests covering config defaults,
parsing, all output templates, token processing, HEC transform, ROT
concurrency, HTTP helpers, fromSample inheritance, and replay generator.

Use strings.Builder for random string/hex, IPv4, and IPv6 token generation
to avoid repeated string concatenation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Simplify review: remove redundancies, fix error wrapping, optimize loops

- Remove TOCTOU os.Stat before os.ReadFile in parseFileConfig
- Use setDefault[T] for sample defaults in validate()
- Fix Get() 404 error wrapping to use %w for proper unwrapping
- Remove unused defaultRandomizeEvents constant
- Add early break in addToken loops, hoist os.Hostname outside loop
- Optimize TestTokenRandomInt to single pipeline run with count:10
- Rename TestDoPostWithHeaders to TestListSendsDefaultHeaders

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Bump version to 0.13.0 for dev release

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Harden config auth and fix UI test/build flow (#82)

lean4: formalize syntax adequacy and pretend test criteria

ProgramAlgebra.lean gains two new sections:
- Section 9: SyntaxCodec, CellEssence, faithfulness criterion
- Section 10: EvalOracle, pretend test formalization

These connect the Lean algebra to the syntax discovery work:
a syntax is adequate iff it faithfully encodes CellDecl,
and the pretend test passes iff the LLM's eval-one oracle
agrees with the formal readySet semantics.

Still sorry-free across entire BeadCalculus project.

Initial implementation of rustsynth - Pilot Rust TUI synthesizer

Sets up full project structure with all Phase 1-8+ components:

- 16 polyphonic voices with ADSR envelopes and 16 oscillator types
- 4 effect groups with 15 effects (reverb, delay, filters, etc.)
- Send-based routing matrix (16 voices × 4 groups)
- Lock-free audio engine using crossbeam-channel + arc-swap
- 3-mode Ratatui TUI (Voices, FX Groups, Routing)
- All unit tests passing

commit.message:
fix: add HOST_INBOUND_GRE for tunnel termination

GRE tunnel interfaces (gr-X/X/X) require the outer GRE protocol
(IP proto 47) to be allowed as host-inbound traffic on the zone
where the tunnel source address lives. Without this, the XDP
pipeline drops outer GRE packets before the kernel can decapsulate
them, making the tunnel deaf.

Add HOST_INBOUND_GRE (bit 21) to the host-inbound flags bitmap
and map GRE protocol 47 in host_inbound_flag() — same pattern as
ESP (proto 50) for IPsec. Users configure it with:

  set security zones security-zone <zone> host-inbound-traffic
      system-services gre

Implemented in eBPF, DPDK, and Go dataplane layers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v0.3.0: lock-free atomic pheromone engine + adaptive evaporation

Replace RwLock<Vec<f64>> with AtomicU64 CAS loops for zero-contention
pheromone updates under high-throughput conditions. Add adaptive
evaporation rate: ρ(t) = ρ_base × (1 + α × CV(latency_window)).

- PheromoneMatrix: lock-free deposit/evaporate via compare_exchange_weak
- AcoConfig: adaptive_evaporation, adaptive_alpha, latency_window_size
- Colony: rolling latency window, dynamic rho computation
- Remove parking_lot dependency

commit.message:
lean4: prove confluence of eval-one — the diamond theorem

New module Confluence.lean proving that Cell's eval-one execution
is confluent: executing two independent ready cells in either order
produces the same graph. This justifies Cell's declarative semantics
and parallel execution model.

Key results:
- Independent execute-maps commute (pointwise + list level)
- Ready monotonicity (executing A doesn't un-ready B)
- The diamond theorem (eval A;B = eval B;A for ready A,B)
- Non-vacuity witnesses for 2 and 3 independent cells

All sorry-free. Zero sorry across the entire BeadCalculus project.

- Rename custom-filters → filters (route, service, Drizzle table)
- Rename notifications/read-all → notifications/ack
- Rename custom-attributes sub-routes → attributes (conversations, contacts)
- Add full CRUD routes: GET/PATCH/DELETE /conversations/:id, /messages/:id, /contacts/:id
- Add PATCH /conversations/:id/attributes, /contacts/:id/attributes, /messages/:id/attributes
- Add conversation.service: updateConversation, deleteConversation, getMessage, updateMessage, updateMessageAttributes, deleteMessage
- Add messages.custom_attributes column (migration 0017)
- Redesign attribute schema: custom_attribute_definitions → attributes table with slug, allow, deny columns; add attribute_targets junction table (N:M with entity types); migration 0018
- Update docs/database-schema.md: clean column names, new tables, updated ERD
- Add docs/modules/conversations.md, messages.md, notifications.md, contacts.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: restore Cloudflare deploy — bls12-381 import + heatmap cache

Two pre-existing CI/deploy failures (broken since March 8th):

1. functions/api/ai/_shared.ts: add .js extension to @noble/curves
   import — the package.json exports map only exposes
   './bls12-381.js', not './bls12-381', breaking wrangler bundler

2. src/services/heatmapCache.ts: clear malformed cache entry on
   JSON parse error — safeStorage.getJSON returns fallback but does
   not remove the bad key; loadHeatmapFromCache now reads raw + tries
   JSON.parse inline, calling clearHeatmapCache() on failure so the
   malformed entry is evicted (fixes heatmapCache.test.ts line 151)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Update navigation links and add client logos

- Update nav menu links to use full paths (/#section) for cross-page navigation

- Remove logo and company name from testimonials section
- Fix client logo slider to show 6 items per row

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: payment gateways and couriers show only Activo or Sin configurar

These providers don't have an independent enable/disable toggle, so
the "Pausado" state was misleading. Set enabled = configured so they
only show "Activo" (green) when configured, "Sin configurar" otherwise.

fix(admin): handle null/undefined is_public in re-publish check (#221) (#221)

Use !== true instead of === false so ideas with null/undefined is_public
also show the "Not visible" badge and "Re-publish" button.
